---
title: "Joshua M. Felton"
---
  
# Introduction

Hello, I'm Joshua M. Felton, a PhD student at Cornell University focused on phylogenetics and evolutionary biology. My research explores the intersection of reproductive biology and adaptation in epiphytic plants, particularly *Catopsis nutans*.

I am currently working on projects related to the phylogeny of *Catopsis*, exploring genetic structure across populations, and investigating the role of sexual and mating systems in shaping biodiversity.

![My GitHub Commits](https://ghchart.rshah.org/409ba5/Frisbeejosh)

Feel free to browse my website to learn more about my research and projects.
